ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phillip Keith for H. Stanton Orser. John Runte for Jose Escalante.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions/objections with regard to the accounting/fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The Petition for Instructions was set for trial on March 12, 2010 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Discovery is to be completed 20 days prior to the trial date. The Court suggested Counsel contact Jeniffer Alcantara from Court Mediation Services.

Judge Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
